utility_evaluation.REASONING: First, identify the number of items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget — total of 5 items. Now check the final coverage plan: it has health_coverage (with both physical and mental insurance and costs clearly stated, plus add-ons, total cost provided), property_coverage (home insurance with cost, add-on, total cost provided), travel_coverage (travel insurance plan with cost), additional_services (enhancements with cost), and total_budget (monthly and annual breakdown). All are fully specified with the required details: type of coverage, costs, and relevant specifics. Therefore, all 5/5 items are present and fully specified.
